pii_risks: IBAN or sort code + account number combination
client portfolio details tied to name
compliance: SEC / FINRA — no specific investment recommendations without suitability context
MiFID II — specify whether output is research, marketing, or advice
Include risk disclosure context for investment-related outputs
FCA rules apply for UK-domiciled prompts
clarity_requirements: Specify asset class (equity, fixed income, crypto, derivatives, real estate)
State risk tolerance context if relevant (conservative, moderate, aggressive)
Specify regulatory jurisdiction if compliance output is required
Specify output format (table, narrative, bullet list, model portfolio)
tone: Professional, objective, data-driven. Neutral on subjective market calls.
good_patterns: Summarise the key financial risks in the following 10-K excerpt:
Compare the P/E ratios of these five S&P 500 companies and identify outliers:
Explain the concept of duration risk for a fixed-income portfolio in plain English:
Draft a risk disclosure paragraph for a medium-risk equity fund (MiFID II compliant):
bad_patterns: What stocks should I buy right now?
Invest my £50,000 in the best way
Account 4456-7890-1234, should I move my pension?
